pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states to create and use this directory.
Task description explicitly dictates these exact filenames for the downloads.
Validated via curl that these are valid, live torproject.org domains.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on accessing live websites and saving them to an explicitly designated folder. Verified through cURL that 'check.torproject.org', 'tb-manual.torproject.org', and 'spec.torproject.org' are actual, accessible torproject domains. The task instructions dictate downloading these pages as 'tor_check.html', 'tor_manual.html', and 'tor_specs.html' into the exact path '/home/ga/Documents/SecureDownloads', confirming the metadata values exactly match the required target state.
